profile.name: n8n_io

intro.title: n8n - Secure Workflow Automation for Technical Teams
intro.desc: n8n is a workflow automation platform that gives technical teams the flexibility of code with the speed of no-code. With 400+ integrations, native AI capabilities, and a fair-code license, n8n lets you build powerful automations while maintaining full control over your data and deployments.
